local_updates: Red, White & Boom is July 3 at Scissortail Park with fireworks.
OKC Comets host Sugar Land July 3–4 with post-game fireworks in Bricktown.
Norman NFourth Fest includes July 3 activities and a July 4 finale with live music and fireworks.
Visit Norman lists July 4 NFourth Fest 250 Celebration, Firecracker 5K, live music, and Red, White and Blue Swim.
Bricktown has the July 1–4 Inaugural 4th of July Boat Parade on the Canal.
Frontier City hosts Star Spangled Nights July 3–4.
OKANA has 4th of July activity and ongoing Friday Fire Dancing Shows.
Shawnee has multiple America 250 and fireworks events July 2–4.
World Cup watch parties may continue at sports bars when major matches are active.
